nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner for specific questions

nodes.label: AI as lesson planning assistant for specific elements
nodes.label_negative: AI as full lesson plan creator

nodes.label: AI as reflective journaling tool for self-understanding
nodes.grounding_span: It honestly made me understand my own thoughts and feelings better after seeing everything re-written into clear, logical sentences

nodes.label: AI as learning resource for teaching development
nodes.grounding_span: AI has been a really valuable resource in helping me 'learn' to be a teacher

nodes.label: Personal engagement with student problem-solving process
nodes.grounding_span: it's important for me to go through the process of doing the problems myself so that I can understand exactly the thought process my students are going through

nodes.label: Preference for personal control over lesson planning and problem-solving
